response.body:
{
    "name": "ReqRes API",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "description": "Fake data CRUD API with custom endpoints for Pro users",
    "documentation": "/api-docs",
    "endpoints": {
        "free": "/api/users",
        "pro": "/custom-endpoints",
        "health": "/health"
    },
    "features": [
        "Fake data generation",
        "Custom endpoints (Pro)",
        "Clerk authentication",
        "Stripe subscriptions"
    ]
}
